Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to prove Fetch stream limits, signal composition, validators, redirect policy, and publisher budgets; every Promise, AbortSignal listener, timer, stream, pool client, transaction, lease, and handle needs an owner; then reorder one timer, Promise, claim, lease, fencing, worker, disconnect, or shutdown settlement and exclude stale effects.
